content.full_text:
January 17, 1992

Ms. Carla Wardlow
Technical Assistance & Analysis Division
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95812

Dear Carla:

This letter is sent to confirm our conversation in which you informed me that new Government Code section 86112.5 does not apply to gifts made in 1991 or earlier. It only applies with respect to gifts made in 1992 and later.

Please contact me if my understanding is incorrect.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

OLSON, CONNELLY, HAGEL, FONG & LEIDIGH

DIANE M. FISHBURN
DMF/kl

LANCE H. OLSON
BRUCE J. HAGEL
LERoy Y. FONG
ROBERT E. LEIDIGH
GEORGE M. WATERS
DIANE M. FISHBURN

OF COUNSEL
LLOYD G. CONNELLY, Member
California State Legislature
